channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260504)
item.description:
What's New

fix: clear history after Enter to prevent cross-boundary restore desync

After Enter in chat apps (Facebook, Telegram), the message is sent and input

cleared, but engine history still contained words from the sent message.

When user backspaced through new text, engine restored old words that no

longer exist on screen, causing buffer-screen desync and garbled output

like 'ddthuwr' instead of 'thử'.

Fix: Use reset() instead of startNewSession() in the Enter branch of

processWordBreak(). reset() clears ALL state including history, buffer,

specialChar, and flags — providing a clean slate after Enter.

Enter is a definitive boundary in all contexts (chat, terminal, editor),

so restoring words across Enter is unreliable and causes desync.

Also removed redundant terminal-specific clearHistory() from

KeyboardEventHandler since processWordBreak now handles all apps.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
